# getascraper/how-to-scrape-ethosia

> Ethosia Scraper is an Apify Actor that extracts structured executive and high-tech job vacancy datasets from ethosia.co.il (Israel's premier executive and high-tech recruitment agency) via its Yoast XML sitemap. Pulls publish and modify dates from JSON-LD graph headers and outbound ATS apply URLs.
> Built with TypeScript, Cheerio, sitemap crawler. Free tier available.

## Overview

- Ethosia.co.il tech jobs scraper and Israeli high-tech recruitment data extraction API
- Extracts: type, jobId, url, title, companyName, location, description, requirements, applyUrl, postedDate, modifiedDate, scrapedAt
- Output formats: JSON, CSV, Excel, XML, RSS
- Free tier: included (pay only for completed runs)

## Key Pages

- README: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-ethosia/blob/main/README.md
- Apify Store: https://apify.com/getascraper/ethosia-scraper
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~ethosia-scraper
- Source Actor: https://github.com/getascraper/actorstack/tree/main/actors/ethosia-scraper
- Yoast sitemap: https://ethosia.co.il/job-sitemap.xml

## How it works

1. Fetch the Yoast XML sitemap at /job-sitemap.xml to discover all live job URLs
2. Optionally accept specific startUrls to override sitemap discovery
3. Send HTTP GET to each job page (Cloudflare in passive mode, no challenge)
4. Parse publish and modify timestamps from Yoast JSON-LD graph headers
5. Extract outbound ATS apply URL (typically BrightSource talents) with the vacancy ID
6. Generic company label (e.g. "High-Tech Startup / Enterprise") since Ethosia hides client brands
7. Push one cleaned, timestamp-enriched row per job to the Apify dataset

## Target site technical quirks

- Yoast SEO plugin emits XML sitemap at /job-sitemap.xml
- Cloudflare is in active mode on the site but no challenge, captcha, or cookie lock on job pages
- No geographic firewall
- Unauthenticated requests get 200 OK
- Yoast JSON-LD graph on each page contains exact published and modified dates

## API Usage

- Node.js SDK: https://docs.apify.com/api/client/js/
- REST API: https://docs.apify.com/api/v2
- MCP server: https://mcp.apify.com/

## Supported target URLs

- https://ethosia.co.il/job-sitemap.xml (full sitemap, used by default)
- https://ethosia.co.il/content/{slug}/ (direct vacancy)
- https://ethosia.co.il/ (homepage with category links)

## Pricing

- Free tier: included
- Paid: $1.99 per 1,000 scraped jobs

## Output schema (highlights)

- type: "job"
- jobId: numeric ID parsed from ATS apply URL or slug
- url: direct vacancy URL
- title: job title
- companyName: "High-Tech Startup / Enterprise" (Ethosia hides real brands)
- location: primary location or tech hub
- description: core job description and company overview
- requirements: specific professional experience and tech requirements
- applyUrl: outbound ATS apply link (BrightSource talents)
- postedDate: ISO 8601 published date from JSON-LD
- modifiedDate: ISO 8601 modified date from JSON-LD
- scrapedAt: ISO 8601 timestamp

## Use cases

- Source elite candidates for executive roles (Mamram / 8200 veterans, CTO, VP Engineering) exclusive to Ethosia's agency board
- Track talent demands across Israeli software engineering, AI, cyber security, and MLOps sectors
- Analyze vacancy durations and hiring velocity using publish and modify timestamps
- Generate B2B leads for tech companies with active high-tech expansion budgets

## Support

- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-ethosia/issues
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~ethosia-scraper/issues
